narrative.headline: Frontend engineer who closes the gap between design and production
narrative.exit_story: Spent 5 years in fintech and e-commerce making slow, brittle UIs fast and reliable. Looking to join a product team where craft and velocity both matter.
superpowers: Turning legacy codebases into maintainable systems without breaking things
Performance optimisation — load time, bundle size, API latency
Building design systems that teams actually use
